title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How different is your life now compared to five years ago?
What person from your past has had the greatest influence on you?
Is there anything from your past that you wish you'd done differently?
How do you feel about looking back on old photos or videos of yourself?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think older generations had harder or easier lives than young people today?
Is it important to preserve and pass on family traditions?
What aspect of today's world do you think future generations will find hard to believe?
